sourceSections: Essential Qualities of a Good Prompt Engineer
The Evolution of Prompt Engineering Techniques
The Future of Human-AI Collaboration in Prompting

sections.lead: Prompt engineering is an iterative process for optimizing LLM inputs to achieve desired outputs, involving trial-and-error and systems thinking.

bullets.label: LLM Optimization
bullets.text: Prompt engineering is an iterative process focused on optimizing inputs to large language models (LLMs) to achieve desired outputs.

bullets.label: Engineering Method
bullets.text: The "engineering" aspect derives from its trial-and-error methodology, allowing users to restart and experiment with inputs.

bullets.label: System Integration
bullets.text: Prompt engineering involves integrating prompts effectively within larger systems and workflows.

bullets.label: Programming Models
bullets.text: This discipline is considered a form of programming models, demanding clear communication and systems thinking from engineers.

sections.lead: Effective prompt engineers require clear communication, iteration, and foresight to anticipate edge cases and refine instructions.

bullets.label: Core Skills
bullets.text: Effective prompt engineers must possess clear communication skills, a strong willingness to iterate, and the foresight to anticipate various edge cases.

bullets.label: Analyze Outputs
bullets.text: It is crucial to closely read and analyze model outputs to understand how the model interprets given instructions.

bullets.label: Spot Misinterpretation
bullets.text: Engineers must identify potential misinterpretations by the model based on its outputs.

bullets.label: Refine Instructions
bullets.text: This process involves systematically fixing issues and continually refining instructions, considering even unusual input scenarios.

sections.lead: Best practices involve providing models with full context and "outs" for unexpected inputs to prevent hallucinations and improve data quality.

bullets.label: Full Context
bullets.text: Provide models with the full, honest context of a task instead of using contrived personas or simplistic metaphors.

bullets.label: Describe Situation
bullets.text: Instead of guessing model knowledge, describe the exact situation and desired outcome clearly.

bullets.label: Provide Outs
bullets.text: Give models "outs" for unexpected inputs, such as instructing them to output "unsure" in ambiguous cases.

bullets.label: Prevent Hallucinations
bullets.text: Providing models with "outs" helps to prevent hallucinations and improves overall data quality.

bullets.label: Instill Intuition
bullets.text: The aim is to instill intuitions in models, similar to explaining a task to a competent human lacking prior context.

sections.lead: Prompt engineering evolves as models advance, reducing the need for simplistic "hacks" and favoring extensive context provision.

bullets.label: Technique Integration
bullets.text: Successful "hacks," such as instructing "think step-by-step" for math problems, are often integrated into models over time.

bullets.label: Model Advancement
bullets.text: As models become more advanced, the need to simplify or "baby" them in prompts significantly diminishes.

bullets.label: Trust Models
bullets.text: Current best practices emphasize trusting models with more information, even providing entire research papers or extensive context.

bullets.label: Complex Integration
bullets.text: Advanced models are capable of integrating complex data and understanding nuanced requests without extensive hand-holding.

sections.lead: The future involves enhanced human-AI collaboration, with models assisting in prompt generation, example creation, and goal clarification.

bullets.label: Model Generation
bullets.text: Users will increasingly leverage models to generate prompts, create examples, and even "interview" them to elicit necessary information.

bullets.label: Expert Consultation
bullets.text: This trend shifts the dynamic of prompt engineering from instructing a simple tool to consulting an expert AI.

bullets.label: AI Role Shift
bullets.text: The relationship with AI could transform from a "temp agency employee" model to a "designer" or "philosopher" model.

bullets.label: Clarify Goals
bullets.text: In this future, AI will help clarify and define the user's implicit goals more effectively.

sections.lead: Effective prompt engineering is the art of externalizing complex thoughts into clear, unambiguous instructions for AI.

bullets.label: Externalize Thoughts
bullets.text: Effective prompt engineering is fundamentally about the art of externalizing one's complex, nuanced thoughts into clear, unambiguous instructions.

bullets.label: Context-Limited AI
bullets.text: These instructions are intended for a highly capable, yet inherently context-limited, artificial intelligence.

bullets.label: Legible Intentions
bullets.text: Making one's intentions legible to the model is a foundational skill that will remain vital.

bullets.label: Maximize AI
bullets.text: This skill is crucial for maximizing the full potential of artificial intelligence systems.
